2026-04-28T16:05:30.3678496Z [36;1mBASE_CONFIG='{"agent":{"build":{"permissions":{"bash":"allow","edit":"allow","read":"allow","glob":"allow","grep":"allow","write":"allow","webfetch":"allow","websearch":"allow"}}}}'[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3679175Z [36;1mif [ -f "$CONFIG" ]; then[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3679670Z [36;1m  MERGED=$(jq -n --argjson base "$BASE_CONFIG" --argjson existing "$(cat "$CONFIG")" '$existing * $base')[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3680182Z [36;1m  echo "$MERGED" > "$CONFIG"[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3680456Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3680964Z [36;1m  echo "$BASE_CONFIG" > "$CONFIG"[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3681242Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:30.3681438Z [36;1mchmod 600 "$CONFIG"[0m
